fields.label: Problem Heading
fields.name: problem_heading
fields.default_value:
Some people say PD is dead.
They're not wrong. Not exactly.

fields.name: problem_emphasis

fields.label: Focus Heading
fields.name: focus_heading
fields.default_value: At RocketPD, we focus on three things:

fields.label: Heading
fields.name: phil_heading
fields.default_value: Unlike traditional professional learning that ends when the session ends...

fields.label: Lead-in
fields.name: phil_leadin
fields.default_value: Every RocketPD experience is designed to be:

fields.label: Closing
fields.name: phil_closing
fields.default_value: This is professional learning designed for real schools.

fields.label: Heading
fields.name: district_heading
fields.default_value: District leaders don't need to search across multiple vendors to support their teams.

fields.label: Emphasis
fields.name: district_emphasis

fields.label: Heading

fields.default_value: We believe professional learning should:
